case_title: CHARLES ANDERSON VS. IG DEVELOPMENT,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT IG DEVELOPMENT,INC.,A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
